station_address: SV Road Junction of, Hill Rd, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050
text: It is a petrol pump or gas station of Hindustan Petroleum near the Bandra railway station. Staffs here are very much cooperative. They provide very fast service.

station_address: SV Road Junction of, Hill Rd, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050
text: It is a petrol pump or gas station of Hindustan Petroleum near the Bandra railway station. Staffs here are very much cooperative. They provide very fast service.

station_address: SV Road Junction of, Hill Rd, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050
text: Never Trust their payment method. While paying a bill of Rs 3000 they denied to show me the amount on card machine and asked me to tap. But later when I asked to swipe I saw the amount on the screen which was Rs 4650 . I was fortunate not to tap and ask him to correct. After facing a lot of heated discussion I got the receipt and apology.

station_address: SV Road Junction of, Hill Rd, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050
text: Very much crowded in evening time but the staff is polite and humble. but make sure you fill fuel during night time or before and after pick hours cause there is lots of Crowed and traffic is also there so you might waste your much time reaching your destination

station_address: SV Road Junction of, Hill Rd, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050
text: Very nice, veryhelpful staff & always Smiling Mr Arun Mane, cashier . Never observed any of the staff ever sitting,  always on their toes and welcoming all their customers with greetings with Namaskar.  Keep it up.

station_address: SV Road Junction of, Hill Rd, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050
text: Location is very convenient. But space is short. It is very inconvenient to fill your tyres. Staff is courteous. Experience is similar to the main pump at junction of Linking and SV roads.

station_address: SV Road Junction of, Hill Rd, Bandra West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400050
text: Good place to fill up tank. However given its location on the Swami Vivekanand road just before the Bandra sea link, and Bandra railway station, there is always a rush in the morning. Of course they are quick.. Try your luck.
